description: Crispy chicken wings tossed in a fiery buffalo sauce, served with rench or blue cheese dip.

Grilled mushrooms, zucchini, peppers, mixed greens, and ranch dressing wrapped up fresh.

Grilled veggies, mixed greens, and sweet chili sauce in a whole wheat tortilla.
